# Icons

<!-- Section: Official Plugins | Category: official-plugins -->

<!-- Explain icon shortcuts via Iconify integration -->

## Config

| Property | Description |
|---|---|
| prefix | <!-- Icon class prefix --> |
| mode | <!-- Rendering mode: mask, background, auto --> |
| scale | <!-- Icon scale factor --> |
| collections | <!-- Icon collections to load --> |
| customizations | <!-- Custom icon transformations --> |
| autoInstall | <!-- Auto-install icon packages --> |
| cwd | <!-- Current working directory for icon resolution --> |
| cdn | <!-- CDN URL for icon loading --> |
| unit | <!-- CSS unit for icon sizing --> |
| extraProperties | <!-- Additional CSS properties for icons --> |
| processor | <!-- SVG processor function --> |
| autocomplete | <!-- Autocomplete configuration for icon names --> |

> See [API Reference — Plugin Icons](/api/plugin-icons) for full type signatures and defaults.
